summary.zh-CN: 变更说明: 补充了配置、接口和多语言等配套支持，提升整体功能可用性。
summary.en: Change Summary: Added supporting work across configuration, APIs, and localization to improve overall feature readiness.

bodyHtml.zh-CN:
产品改进

补充了配置、接口和多语言等配套支持

  • 变更说明: 补充了配置、接口和多语言等配套支持，提升整体功能可用性。
  • 影响范围: 影响 语音输入与录音、配置行为、分布式会话运行时。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有的语音录音入口，无需额外设置即可获得更新后的行为。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

项目、仓库和工作区相关操作

  • 变更说明: 改进了项目、仓库和工作区相关操作，提升代码定位与切换效率。
  • 影响范围: 影响 project 相关功能、quick-actions 相关功能、提示词与任务引导。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

模型、提示词和 AI Provider 相关能力

  • 变更说明: 增强了模型、提示词和 AI Provider 相关能力，让配置和使用方式更完整。
  • 影响范围: 影响 ai 相关功能、提示词与任务引导、配置行为。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

问题修复

extract original content for new block annotations相关问题。

  • 变更说明: 修复了extract original content for new block annotations相关问题。
  • 影响范围: 影响 客户端状态处理、proposal 相关功能、分布式会话运行时。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该条目还包含配套的稳定性或清理工作，用来保证可见行为在新流程下保持可靠。

提醒与通知相关行为

  • 变更说明: 优化了提醒与通知相关行为，提升触达稳定性和可用性。
  • 影响范围: 影响 proposal 相关功能、分布式会话运行时、ai 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。
bodyHtml.en:
Product Improvements

Supporting work

  • Change Summary: Added supporting work across configuration, APIs, and localization to improve overall feature readiness.
  • Impact: Affects voice input and recording, configuration behavior, distributed session runtime.
  • How to Use: Use the existing voice recording entry points; the updated behavior is available without extra setup.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Project

  • Change Summary: Improved project, repository, and workspace actions to make code access and switching more efficient.
  • Impact: Affects Project, Quick Actions, prompt and task guidance.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Model

  • Change Summary: Enhanced model, prompt, and AI provider capabilities to make configuration and usage more complete.
  • Impact: Affects Ai, prompt and task guidance, configuration behavior.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Fixes

Issues related

  • Change Summary: Fixed issues related to extract original content for new block annotations.
  • Impact: Affects client state handling, Proposal, Git and repository tools.
  • How to Use: Open the Git or repository-related panels you already use; the new capability is surfaced inside those existing actions.
  • Notes: This item also includes supporting stability or cleanup work so the visible behavior stays reliable under the updated flow.

Reminder and notification behavior for better reliability and usability.

  • Change Summary: Improved reminder and notification behavior for better reliability and usability.
  • Impact: Affects Proposal, client state handling, Git and repository tools.
  • How to Use: Open the Git or repository-related panels you already use; the new capability is surfaced inside those existing actions.
  • Notes: This item also includes supporting stability or cleanup work so the visible behavior stays reliable under the updated flow.
